task_summary: Retry explicit --live-desk support after issue #3 was fixed, preserving fixture defaults and adding injected-runner live desk coverage.
notes: SP18 was retried after issue #3 was closed by 14b670a and merged into side/r2. Mew reached edit planning but still could not apply the product patch. A first source-only dry-run failed the focused verifier because paired tests/docs were not yet updated. A complete source/tests/README/report batch then failed because one ghost.py edit hunk matched two locations. After steering, a second complete batch failed because ghost.py hunks overlapped. The operator opened issue #14 for the remaining hunk-shaping problem. Mew was then steered to use full-file write_file for ghost.py/tests, but stopped with an exact blocker: it could not safely emit the required complete three-file write_file JSON batch without risking truncation or malformed content. The operator opened issue #15 for this large write_file patch-shaping limit. No product files were changed and no Codex product-code rescue edits were made.
